ddls:
CREATE TABLE "risk_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk the metric is associated with */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the risk */,
  "exploitability" REAL /* Ease of exploitability of the risk */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the risk metric (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "impact_factor" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the impact factor of the risk */,
  "mitigation_status" TEXT /* Status of the mitigation efforts (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the risk category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categorization) */,
  "category_weight" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the importance or weight of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mitigation_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mitigation strategy */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk the strategy is proposed for */,
  "strategy_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mitigation strategy */,
  "strategy_detected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the mitigation strategy was first proposed */,
  "strategy_last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the strategy */,
  "strategy_status" TEXT /* Status of the strategy (e.g., Proposed, Approved, Implemented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_impact_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact analysis */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk being analyzed */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the potential impact */,
  "probability" REAL /* Probability of the risk occurring */,
  "impact_detected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the impact analysis was first conducted */,
  "impact_last_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the impact analysis */,
  "impact_severity" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the severity of the impact */,
  "impact_mitigation_effort" INTEGER /* Numerical value representing the effort required to mitigate the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network operator, security analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* ID of the risk the report is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Finalized, Archived) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
